error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: OpenAI Transcribe node missing file name
symptom: When executing the OpenAI Transcribe node, an error occurs stating 'Bad request - please check your parameters'. This indicates that the file input is not being recognized correctly.
applies_when: File is provided as binary data
not_this_if: File has a valid name assigned
Error occurs in a different node
root_cause: The OpenAI API requires that the uploaded file has a valid name. If the file is provided without a name, it results in a value error, preventing the API from processing the request correctly.
fix_steps: Ensure the previous node provides a valid file name in the output
Check the configuration of the OpenAI Transcribe node to ensure it references the correct binary property name
Retry the execution of the workflow
agent_instruction: Assign a valid file name to the audio file in the previous node's output.
